scripts.upload-cannon: aws s3 sync build/images s3://cannonemployeestore.com/images --delete --size-only && aws s3 sync build s3://cannonemployeestore.com/ --delete --exclude "images/*" && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E14D6FK2VK66GQ --paths "/*"
scripts.upload-gpc81: aws s3 sync build/images s3://gpc81.com/images --delete --size-only && aws s3 sync build s3://gpc81.com/ --delete --exclude "images/*" && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id E1R5RLNLHZTA8G --paths "/*"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run upload-cannon && npm run upload-gpc81
